headline: Danaher’s Cepheid Ebola Tests Highlight Diagnostics Role In Global Crises
summary: Cepheid, a Danaher (NYSE:DHR) subsidiary, is donating and deploying Xpert Hemorrhagic Fever panel tests in response to the Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda. The support is aligned with the World Health Organization's declaration of a Public Health Emergency of International Concern. The rapid rollout of these diagnostic tests is aimed at strengthening frontline Ebola detection and response capacity in affected regions. For investors watching...

headline: Danaher Corporation’s (DHR) Recovery Fell Short of Investor Expectations
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Large Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Madison Large Cap Fund (Class I) declined 2.7% in the quarter, outperforming the S&P 500’s -4.33% return. The fund focuses on long-term capital appreciation. The quarter saw […]

headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Jim Cramer on Fortive: “It’s Nothing Special, Frankly”
summary: Fortive Corporation (NYSE:FTV) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer said that the stock’s rally caught him by surprise, as he remarked: Fifth is one you may not know, Fortive. It’s an industrial technology company known for precision instruments that was spun off […]

headline: Piper Sandler Begins Coverage of Danaher (DHR) While Waiting for New Growth Catalysts
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) is included among Billionaire Larry Robbins’ 10 Dividend Stock Picks.
